<file>
00001| import { Network } from '../../../lib/alchemy/config';
00002| import { TokenPrice } from './price.types';
00003| 
00004| // Token metadata response
00005| export interface TokenMetadataResponse {
00006|   /** The token's name. Is null if not defined. */
00007|   name: string | null;
00008|   /** The token's symbol. Is null if not defined. */
00009|   symbol: string | null;
00010|   /** The number of decimals of the token. Is null if not defined. */
00011|   decimals: number | null;
00012|   /** URL link to the token's logo. Is null if not available. */
00013|   logo: string | null;
00014| }
00015| 
00016| // Portfolio address for multi-chain queries
00017| export interface PortfolioAddress {
00018|   /** Array of network identifiers (e.g., eth-mainnet). */
00019|   networks: Network[];
00020|   /** Wallet address. */
00021|   address: string;
00022| }
00023| 
00024| // Response for tokens by wallet
00025| export interface GetTokensByWalletResponse {
00026|   data: {
00027|     tokens: Array<{
00028|       /** The token contract address. If undefined or null, the token is a native token! */
00029|       tokenAddress?: string | null;
00030|       /** The blockchain network where the token is located. */
00031|       network: Network;
00032|       /** The wallet address for which the token data applies. */
00033|       address: string;
00034|       /** The quantity of the token held, represented as a raw string (e.g., in wei). */
00035|       tokenBalance: string;
00036|       /** Optional metadata about the token. */
00037|       tokenMetadata?: TokenMetadataResponse;
00038|       /** Optional pricing data for the token. */
00039|       tokenPrices?: TokenPrice[];
00040|     }>;
00041|     /** A string used for pagination to retrieve additional results if available. */
00042|     pageKey: string;
00043|   };
00044| }
00045| 
00046| // Response for token balances by wallet (simplified)
00047| export interface GetTokenBalancesByWalletResponse {
00048|   data: {
00049|     tokens: Array<{
00050|       /** The network where the token resides. */
00051|       network: Network;
00052|       /** The wallet address associated with the token balance. */
00053|       address: string;
00054|       /** The contract address of the token. If undefined or null, the token is a native token! */
00055|       tokenAddress?: string | null;
00056|       /** The balance of the token, represented as a raw string value. */
00057|       tokenBalance: string;
00058|     }>;
00059|     /** A string used for pagination. */
00060|     pageKey: string;
00061|   };
00062| }
</file>
